scripts.dev:bypass: bun run --cwd packages/api dev:bypass & bun run --cwd packages/web dev:bypass & wait
scripts.test: bun run test:engine && bun run test:data && bun run test:db && bun run test:api
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/engine typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/data typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck:tools
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.base.json eslint.config.mjs .github/workflows/*.yml packages/*/package.json packages/*/tsconfig*.json packages/db/drizzle.config.ts packages/web/vite.config.ts packages/web/playwright.config.ts packages/web/playwright.auth.config.ts
scripts.ci: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.bench: bun test --cwd packages/engine --filter perf && bun --env-file=.env --cwd packages/api test --filter perf
